AN EF0 TORNADO WITH PEAK WINDS OF 75 MPH AND A MAX WIDTH OF 50 YARDS TRACKED FROM 3 MILES NORTH NORTHWEST OF OWENSBORO KY ALONG W COUNTY ROAD 560S TO 5 MILES SOUTHWEST OF ROCKPORT ALONG W COUNTY ROAD 440S FOR A PATH LENGTH OF 2 MILES. NUMEROUS TREE LIMBS WERE BROKEN ALONG WITH A FEW SMALLER TREES SNAPPED.

DAMAGE PATH WAS HALF MILE WIDE AND 3 MILES LONG. WINDS ESTIMATED BETWEEN 60 AND 70 MPH. TWO UNANCHORED VERY OLD SHEDS WERE DESTROYED. A NEW METAL BLDG UNDER CONSTRUCTION HAD THE STEEL ROOF PARTIALLY PEELED OFF. HOWEVER THE SOFFIT HAD NOT BEEN INSTALLED YET MAKING IT VERY EASY FOR THE WIND TO INFILTRATE UNDER THE ROOF. OTHERWISE THERE WERE NUMEROUS DEAD AND ROTTEN TREES DOWNED ALONG WITH LARGE LIMBS OF LIVE TREES. THERE WERE TWO EYEWITNESS ACCOUNTS OF THE STORM.
NUMEROUS REPORTS OF FLASH FLOODING OCCURRING THROUGHOUT THE COUNTY. SPECIFICS TO FOLLOW.
